banner.message: Verify the address bar and TLS certificate before entering any password, key, or credential.

trust.title: Secure Secret Input
trust.body: Your secret is encrypted locally in your browser. Encrypted data is then sent securely to the agent. Plaintext never leaves this page.

cards.localBody: Encryption happens in your browser. No plaintext is ever uploaded.
cards.signedBody: This page is protected by a temporary, single-use security link.
cards.deliveryBody: Data is held securely until retrieved by the intended agent.

checklist.first: 1. Check that the address bar is correct.
checklist.second: 2. Match the session code with your request.
checklist.third: 3. Close this tab when you are finished.

form.title: Submit a secret to the agent
form.previewNotice: Preview mode is active. Inputs are enabled for local QA only and no secret will be transmitted.
form.singlePlaceholder: Enter a password, token, or API key
form.multiPlaceholder: Paste a certificate, PEM block, or JSON credential
form.footnote: Client-side encryption happens before any payload leaves this page.
form.footnotePreview: Preview mode stays local. No secret is encrypted, uploaded, or stored remotely.

success.title: Secret securely encrypted
success.statusSubmitted: Secret submitted successfully. You may safely close this window.
success.detailSubmitted: The secret left this browser only as an encrypted payload scoped to the current request.
success.statusPreview: Preview complete. The form flow worked, but no secret was transmitted.
success.detailPreview: Use a signed session link when you want to exercise real encryption and submission.

status.previewReady: Preview mode is active. Inputs are unlocked for local QA without a live signed session.
status.requestReady: Verify the session code, then enter the secret you want to encrypt for the agent.
status.loginRequiredSubmit: Workspace login is required before this secret can be submitted.
status.alreadySubmitted: This request already has a submitted secret.
status.loginRequiredOpen: Workspace login is required before this request can be opened.
status.wrongWorkspace: This request is not available in your current workspace session.
status.connectFailed: Failed to connect to the server. Preview mode is available for local layout and interaction testing.
